uncertainties.read: Field-split Schedule A sheet: 'Amount of Income' block (Block D) plus a right-hand 'Transaction Summary' block with columns P / FS / PS. Value (Block B) and Type of Income (Block C) blocks are on separate sheets (Block C is page 161) and are nulled here. Amount column headers (Min/Max): 0/0=None, 0.01/200.5=$1-$200, 201/1000=$201-$1,000, 1001/2500=$1,001-$2,500, 2501/5000=$2,501-$5,000, 5000.5/15000=$5,001-$15,000, 15001/50000=$15,001-$50,000, 50000.5/100000=$50,001-$100,000, 100001/1000000=$100,001-$1,000,000, 1000001/5000000=$1,000,001-$5,000,000, 5000001/1E+09=Over $5,000,000, Spouse/DC Income over 1000000=Spouse/DC Asset with income over $1,000,000. Same trust header 'M&R Trust Partnership' and same asset slice as page 161 (BROAD STREET through WEST STREET ENERGY); merge by asset name with the page-161 Type-of-Income sheet and the Value sheet for this slice. Cross-check confirmed: every row marked NONE income type on page 161 shows amount_of_income None here, and rows with an actual income type show positive amounts.

GLOBAL LONG SHORT PARTNERS 100%: single transaction mark read as FS (full sale), consistent with a fully-liquidated fund position. Column placement is between P and FS in the crops; could alternatively be P. Lower confidence.

ODM INVESTORS LP (a) (liquidated in 2018): amount read as $1-$200 (mark in second amount column). Positive amount here corroborates a real income type on page 161 (recorded there as DIVIDENDS) rather than None.
